name: Cover Music Player
description: Cover-Player für ON Radio und 80s80s mit Programmübersicht, Albumcovern und Stream-Wiedergabe.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.0nradio.com https://www.80s80s.de https://itunes.apple.com; img-src 'self' https://*.mzstatic.com https://images.80s80s.de data: blob:; media-src 'self' https://*.radionetz.de https://streams.80s80s.de http://streams.80s80s.de https://*.streamabc.net http://*.streamabc.net;
